summary: Frontend testing for new Order Management enhancements completed. All 7 features tested and PASSED: Print Modal with company header, order details, items table with Rate/MRP/Amount columns, transport and invoice details; Edit Items Modal showing Rate and MRP for each item with support for string-based quantities (10+5 scheme format); WhatsApp send button opens wa.me with formatted order message; Print button triggers browser print dialog via react-to-print.
seed_data_creation: Used existing orders for testing (ORD-000001 to ORD-000004)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order management enhancements fully tested. Key tested components: 1) Print Modal at end of Orders.jsx (lines ~1440-1560) with company branding, order sheet layout, items table with Rate/MRP/Amount columns, transport details, invoice details. 2) Edit Items Modal with Rate/MRP display next to each item and text input for scheme quantities (10+5 format). 3) WhatsApp function opens wa.me URL with formatted message including items, rates, and order details. 4) react-to-print library used for Print functionality.

orders_page_load.details: Orders page loads with Print and WhatsApp action buttons visible in Actions column

print_modal.details: Print Modal opens showing: company header (VMP Pharma Distributors, address, email, GST), ORDER SHEET heading with order number/date/status, Bill To section with customer details, items table with S.No/Item Code/Item Name/Qty/Rate(₹)/MRP(₹)/Amount(₹) columns, Total Items and Grand Total, Transport Details (Transport, Tracking, Station, Payment, Packages), Invoice Details (Invoice No, Date, Value), 'Thank you for your business!' footer

print_modal_buttons.details: Print Modal has Close, Send WhatsApp, and Print buttons - all functional

edit_items_modal_rate_mrp.details: Edit Items Modal shows Rate and MRP for each item (e.g., 'Rate: ₹35 MRP: ₹50')

edit_items_modal_scheme_qty.details: Edit Items Modal allows entering string quantities like '10+5' scheme format - text input with placeholder 'Qty (e.g. 10 or 10+5)'

whatsapp_button_order_row.details: WhatsApp button in order row opens wa.me with formatted message containing company name, order number, customer details, items with Rate/MRP, date and status

whatsapp_button_print_modal.details: Send WhatsApp button in Print Modal opens same formatted message

print_button.details: Print button uses react-to-print library with printRef - triggers browser print dialog (verified setup, native dialog cannot be automated)

ui_verification.print_modal_layout: Professional order sheet layout with proper borders, sections clearly separated, company branding at top, items table with correct columns
ui_verification.edit_items_modal_layout: Clean layout with item details (name, code, Rate, MRP, GST) and quantity input with 'Out of Stock' button per item
ui_verification.buttons_visibility: Print (blue) and WhatsApp (green) icons clearly visible in Actions column with appropriate colors and hover states
